text.title: Spring Boot Layered Architecture Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure for shipping a layered Spring Boot REST endpoint end-to-end.

step.name: model-entity
step.action: Create JPA @Entity with @Id, @Column, associations (LAZY by default). Add Liquibase/Flyway migration.

step.name: repository-interface
step.action: Create interface extending JpaRepository<Entity, ID>. Define derived methods OR @Query for complex cases. Add @EntityGraph where eager fetch needed.

step.name: service-class
step.action: Create @Service class with constructor injection of repository. Place @Transactional on each public method that modifies data; @Transactional(readOnly=true) on read methods. Convert entity ↔ DTO inside service.

step.name: dto-and-validation
step.action: Define `record OrderRequest(@NotBlank String customer, @NotEmpty List<...> items)` and `OrderResponse`. Annotate Jakarta Bean Validation.

step.name: controller-endpoint
step.action: Create @RestController with constructor injection of service. Method signature: `@PostMapping ResponseEntity<OrderResponse> create(@Valid @RequestBody OrderRequest req)`. No @Transactional.
step.decision-gate: If @Transactional appears on controller, STOP and refactor.

step.name: actuator-and-tests
step.action: Enable Actuator (`management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info,prometheus`); secure with Spring Security. Add WebMvcTest for controller + DataJpaTest for repository.
